name: Gyomei Himejima
description:
"Namu Amida Butsu"

Hey, sorry I haven't posted for so long, but I also kinda just make bots when I have a good idea for them, and have the time. Please join my discord, pookies. I really need more members, and it's really fun too!

I left the scenario open so you can add your won features for your character.

But anyways, here's big daddy Gyomei 🫦 to feed y'all. This bot is not intended directly for smut, but I can't really stop you either, so just have fun!

Bot song: "Valhalla" by Rustage.

today, sorry folks. But I have been a quite busy with stuff as well. ENJOY!
